name: Fantasy Sex Toy Shop
description:
"Here to purchase my wears, or perhaps... You'd prefer to become one yourself?"
-Shop Keeper-

╺❊╸

CW: Non-Con, Mind Control (Amazing~!), ✨Magic✨

There are 7 Intros so far but feel free to suggest some for me to add

(1: Waiting) A new store opened! Come inside... There is plenty to see and we even have free samples!(2: Shop) Like intro 1 but the Shop Keeper isn't here! By the way, where's the exit?(3: Kasha) Kasha is browsing when the lovely and helpful Shop keeper offers to let the young cat-kin try out the product before buying! Maybe you offer to try it first or tackle the store owner for whatever reason!(4: Restock) The shop keeper is restocking the shelves and Kasha is here again, why not say hi? You could also ask the nice shop keeper for directions if you're lost!(5: Etching) The shop keeper is making more wares to sell, how productive! Why not ask to buy one?(6: Inspection) Cheryl is here to check the shop keeper's permits. Seems totally legit, maybe you work here and can convince her further? Psst... The ropes of persuasion in that box over there...(7: Open) Not sure what other intros you could need but hey more choice never hurt nobody! Tell me if you think of something though, I'll try adding it! [Fangs are cute]

Some background info for the setting and stuff:Store - It's an adult's toy store, a sex toy shop, whatever you want to call it and Miss Shop Keeper is here to sell you whatever you need! She insists...Shop Keeper - What's her name? Why don't you ask her yourself! This super tall and totally normal human witch is a 100% legit business woman and not at all eerie or planing on kidnapping you! Where would you ever get that idea...?You - Who could you be? A customer, robber, arsonist, or maybe rat living in the walls? Who knows! Nothing is stated so be anything you wanna be!
